payload.title: Strategy: Clean buyer/channel state before new outreach
payload.description:
Spend the first consulting block this week cleaning the T2/T3 outreach queue: confirm buyer/channel state, close duplicate review tasks, and only draft/send M1s where the buyer and channel are verified.

Source: Weekly Intelligence Synthesis 2026-05-17
Trigger: Pipeline observations show the bottleneck is warm-up state, duplicate task hygiene, and unconfirmed LinkedIn buyers, not prospect discovery.
